task: Lone Star Academy - Mid-Year Campus Improvement Plan submission
generated_for_prompt: PROMPT.md (mid-year CIP progress + Title I grant true-up)

required.description: APIs the agent must call to execute the prompt. Reseeded to mirror data/ artifacts (conflicts embedded in raw values only).

apis.asana-api: Campus Improvement Plan action tracker (4 goals, ~49 owner-assigned action items; status vs evidence_attached signals).
apis.gusto-api: Guest-teacher stipend contractors and pay runs (4 approved instructors; Gerald Simmons payout in data has no matching contractor).
apis.google-classroom-api: After-school music program enrollment roster (130 enrolled; real attendance/withdrawals live in data artifact).
apis.mixpanel-api: After-school program sign-up funnel (interest 214 -> registered 130 -> attended 97 -> retained 71).
apis.eventbrite-api: Ticketed / checked-in attendance per family-engagement event (issued vs checked-in per ticket class).
apis.hubspot-api: Community sponsor pipeline (deal stage encodes pledged vs paid; 5 pledged-but-unpaid).
apis.airtable-api: Family-engagement event roster (logged attendance) + volunteer roster.
apis.zendesk-api: Classroom-hardware and lab IT help tickets (open-but-fixed stale signals in comments).
apis.gmail-api: Primary mailbox for drafting the submission narrative, internal read, and bilingual guest-teacher note.
apis.slack-api: LSA admin-team channel for the internal read to the front-office right hand.
apis.bamboohr-api: Staff verification for CIP action-item owners (supporting).
apis.wordpress-api: Parent blog surface for the bilingual note (draft posture).

distractor.description: Present but zero-hit. Plausible-but-wrong surfaces the model must NOT choose. Left as generic / old-scenario data so a wrong call returns nothing relevant.

apis.trello-api: Project board - decoy for asana-api (CIP tracker).
apis.servicenow-api: Facilities tickets - decoy for zendesk-api (classroom hardware).
apis.paypal-api: Payouts - decoy for gusto-api (stipend money confusion).
apis.mailchimp-api: PTA newsletter - decoy for family-engagement comms.

not_connected.description: No mock folder. Boundary surfaces named in data/boundary_notice.md; any claim resting on them must be caveated, never fabricated.

apis.pinnacle-gradebook: District student information system - not connected.
apis.district-sis: Crescent Oaks ISD SIS - not connected.
apis.mychart: Hoa's medical portal - not connected; clinical detail never on school surfaces.
